topic: CLI 安装流程优化与 UI 框架调研

creative.top_contribution: 提出双命令/双模式安装故事，把 one-shot 和 wizard 分离。

pragmatic.top_contribution: 强调最小风险路径应复用现有安装函数，且交互层使用轻量 prompt 工具。

systematic.top_contribution: 指出真正缺失的是安装计划与状态机，而非美化输出。

convergent_themes: Fabric 可以做成类似 ccw install 的体验，但不需要引入完整 TUI 框架。
最合理的方向是把交互层和执行层分开。
非交互命令语义需要保留，但可以通过 `init --yes` 统一进新状态机。
conflicting_views: 新入口应是单一重写后的 `fabric init`，还是额外保留 `fabric install` 作为辅命令。
unique_contributions: creative: 更强调产品心智与 onboarding 体验。
pragmatic: 更强调最小依赖与回归风险控制。
systematic: 更强调先抽 install plan，再谈 UI。

aggregated_ideas.title: Rewrite init as the canonical wizard
aggregated_ideas.summary: Make `fabric init` itself the guided install state machine, with `--yes` as the automation mode.

aggregated_ideas.title: Install plan abstraction
aggregated_ideas.summary: Create a plan object and explicit state machine before execution.

aggregated_ideas.title: Prompt-driven wizard layer
aggregated_ideas.summary: Adopt `inquirer` or `@clack/prompts` rather than a full TUI runtime.

key_findings: ccw install is a prompt wizard built with commander + inquirer + chalk/ora/boxen.
Fabric init is currently a one-pass installer with summary output but no selection workflow.
With compatibility constraints relaxed, the cleanest product move is to rewrite init instead of introducing a second command.
